title: Targa (TRGP) to Purchase Grand Prix Pipeline Stake for $1B

title: Targa Resources: Low Yield But Still Worth Consideration
text: Targa Resources is a natural gas liquids-focused midstream corporation that primarily operates in Texas. The company enjoys remarkably stable cash flows, with more than 80% of its cash flow being recession and commodity-price-resistant.
